description: Guild Season 12 statue addition, marketplace notification changes, faction warfare adjustments, Hellgate PvE reward increases, and targeted combat balance tweaks.

sections.heading: New Statue in Conquerors' Hall
items: New statue honoring SUN added to Conquerors' Hall
Includes MudHouse and MAHARLIKA as 2nd and 3rd place
Season 12 statue items can now be used as furniture

sections.heading: Mobile Improvements and Fixes
items: Added on-press tooltips for Hideouts on zone map
Double-tap zoom camera disabled by default

sections.heading: Marketplace Mail Changes
sections.description: Reduced notification spam and improved summaries.
items: Notifications sent only when orders are fully completed or expired
Mails now summarize all transactions instead of per transaction alerts

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.searchable_text: combat balance axes maces adrenaline deep leap

changes.raw_text: Ability damage can now maintain the buff
notes: Buff remains active when hitting enemies with abilities (e.g. Whirlwind, Rending Spin)

sections.heading: Faction Warfare Changes
sections.description: Restrictions and improvements to faction gameplay.
items: Roads of Avalon cannot be entered while faction-flagged
Faction Outposts cannot be claimed while mounted
sections.searchable_text: faction warfare roads avalon outposts mounted

sections.heading: Other Changes
items: Increased PvE rewards in Lethal Hellgates (2v2 +10%, 5v5 +20%, 10v10 +30%)
Avalonian Mages no longer appear on minimap in Elite Dungeons
sections.searchable_text: hellgate rewards elite dungeon avalonian mages

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Fixed repeated Corrupted Dungeon tutorial popup
Corrected Destiny Board unlock display for multiple mounts and Royal gear
Fixed non-functional Gold Market UI store button
Corrected Party Finder average IP display
Fixed Lunging Strike hitting same target multiple times
Additional graphical, audio, UI, and localization fixes
sections.searchable_text: fixes destiny board mounts ui bugs combat
